item.title: Kitchen & Dining Deals UK: Best Picks & Price Drops
item.description: Six kitchen & dining deals on eBay UK with prices, condition notes and tips to help you buy kitchen & dining online UK with confidence. Shop now—save big.

item.title: Kitchen & Dining: Best Finds Under £69 — Buy Guide!
item.description: Find boxed, rare and cheap kitchen & dining bargains on eBay UK — a guide to buy kitchen & dining items (1970s Dema included) under £69. Shop now — save.
